creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update net/lftp port.


diff -Nru lftp/Makefile lftp-1.2.4/Makefile
--- lftp/Makefile	Thu Jan 21 02:30:05 1999
+++ lftp-1.2.4/Makefile	Sun Mar 14 16:59:55 1999
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	lftp
-# Version required:			1.2.3
+# Version required:			1.2.4
 # Date created:				11 September 1997
 # Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.13 1999/01/20 18:00:50 steve Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	lftp-1.2.3
+DISTNAME=	lftp-1.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.yars.free.net/pub/software/unix/net/ftp/client/lftp-old/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE}
diff -Nru lftp/files/md5 lftp-1.2.4/files/md5
--- lftp/files/md5	Mon Jan 11 02:52:09 1999
+++ lftp-1.2.4/files/md5	Sun Mar 14 17:00:03 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (lftp-1.2.3.tar.gz) = c94396bebce31c11cae1ad8daadd4e45
+MD5 (lftp-1.2.4.tar.gz) = cf4e8d2cff78c64d5a56d35daa5982af

Fix: 

Please, check and commit this port.
